level_signals: +2 years of experience in technical project management, program management, or delivery management
Primary delivery contact for enterprise customers; owns end-to-end delivery lifecycle
Manages multiple concurrent projects with global, distributed teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: +2 years of experience in technical project management, program management, or delivery management for SaaS or enterprise software.
Hands-on experience delivering solutions involving at least one of: Contact Center / CCaaS, UCaaS, conversational AI, IVA/IVR, or related CX platforms.
Demonstrated ability to work across technical and business stakeholders (IT, Security, Operations, Business Owners).
Solid understanding of software delivery methodologies (Agile/Scrum, Hybrid, and Waterfall) and when to apply each.
Strong skills in project planning tools (e.g., Jira, Asana, Monday, MS Project, Smartsheet) and collaboration tools (e.g., Confluence, Notion, Miro).
Excellent communication, facilitation, and conflict resolution skills.
Proven track record managing multiple concurrent projects with global, distributed teams.
Fluency in English & Italian is required

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience delivering AI/ML, NLP, LLM-based, or Agentic AI solutions.
Background in professional services or consulting working with enterprise clients.
Familiarity with APIs, webhooks, event-driven architectures, cloud infra (AWS/Azure/GCP).
Certifications: PMP, PRINCE2, CSM/CSPO, SAFe, or equivalent.
Experience with partner co-delivery (SI, GSI, BPO, or ISV ecosystems).

scope.surface: End-to-end delivery of Agentic AI / conversational AI platform deployments for enterprise customers; pod model (TPM + Forward Deployed Engineer + Agent Architect)
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / enterprise software — conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Time to First Agent in UAT
Defect and incident trends during QA/UAT and Hypercare
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end delivery for assigned Agentic AI customer projects (scope, schedule, budget, risk, quality)
Run the pod (TPM + FDE + Agent Architect) as a single accountable delivery unit
Select and apply appropriate delivery methodology (Waterfall, Agile, or Hybrid) based on customer context and risk profile
Serve as primary delivery contact for customer project sponsors, IT, and business stakeholders
Facilitate recurring governance: status calls, steering committees, UAT readouts, and go-live reviews
Maintain up-to-date project plan, RAID log, and change log
Coordinate with Forward Deployed Engineers and Agent Architects
Report delivery status, risk posture, and mitigation plans to internal and external stakeholders

green_flags: Clear pod delivery model with defined cross-functional roles (TPM + FDE + Agent Architect)
Specific, measurable deployment KPIs defined in the JD (Time to Blueprint, Time to Go-Live, etc.)
Company has shipped over one billion interactions with named enterprise clients (Booking.com, Allianz, SAP, TUI)
red_flags: Location not specified in the JD body — unclear if this is remote, hybrid, or onsite in Italy
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not addressed
Minimum years requirement is low (+2 years) but the scope described (enterprise, multi-stakeholder, global) implies senior-level expectations
Role title includes 'Italy' but no Italian city or office location is named
